diagrams.title: Cartesian Product A × B
diagrams.description: Grid representation showing ordered pairs from two sets
diagrams.purpose: Visualize all possible combinations in Cartesian product

diagrams.title: Relation as Arrow Diagram
diagrams.description: Directed graph showing which elements relate to which
elements: Set A = {1,2,3} drawn as left oval
Set B = {a,b,c} drawn as right oval
Arrows from A to B for each ordered pair in R
diagrams.purpose: Understand relation as mapping between two sets

diagrams.title: Relation Matrix
diagrams.description: Boolean matrix representation of finite relation
diagrams.purpose: Matrix representation for computing compositions and analyzing properties

diagrams.title: Hasse Diagram of Partial Order
diagrams.description: Directed acyclic graph showing covering relations in poset
